title: Darshan Hiranandani : How Can I Create an Automation That Triggers When an Email Is Received?

posts.author: darshanhiranandani (Darshan Hiranandani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Everyone, I’m Darshan Hiranandani, I have a questions, What are the general steps or best practices for setting up an automation that activates upon receiving an email? Are there specific tools or platforms that facilitate this process?

Regards
Darshan Hiranandani
